tweets.text:
i really wonder what will separate the top achievers 10 years from now on. when everybody’ll have optimized their lives best as they can with the tools available, what will there be left to compete over? 

i know there’ll be no shortage of competition, i just wonder what it’ll be
me n genesis against the world

i can’t wait to be out of debt to start working on a solo leveling-like system with smart glasses&ear piece

soon enough every breath that i take will compound
i just need to post more
your body is just your bridge between your inner world and shared reality, or a manifestation of the former
